Coomer Park, 618 Apollo Rd, Garland, TX 75040, USA

Lots and lots of pecan trees when in season
Thrashing isnt allowed but once fallen anyone can have Access: Public.
between Brand and Kingsbridge on Naaman School Road - Garland Texas 75040

There is an old pecan grove located on a flood plain by Coomer Creek. It is city-owned property and they have a few sheds where they store equipment. Also only a few yards from this pecan grove there is a bamboo grove where I get bamboo poles for garden stakes
